title: (Bullish Signal) IRMD enters Uptrend as Momentum ascends above 0 level on Mar 08, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This indicator may be signaling that IRMD's price has momentum to move higher, since its current price exceeds the price logged 14 days ago. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested 86 similar cases where IRMD's Momentum Indicator exceeded 0, and 75 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 87%. Current price $24.49 crossed the resistance line at $24.24 and is trading between $25.09 resistance and $24.24 resistance lines. Throughout the month of 02/03/21 - 03/08/21, the price experienced a -7% Downtrend, while the week of 03/01/21 - 03/08/21 shows a +0.50% Uptrend.

https://preview.redd.it/vhtydi5eo1m61.png?width=1529&format=png&auto=webp&s=cd0bcec2c2b9a9010366fa882272d4c86d4576f1

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on March 08, 2021. You may want to consider a long position or call options on IRMD as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 75 of 86 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 87%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for IRMD just turned positive on March 05, 2021. Looking at past instances where IRMD's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise, Tickeron A.I. shows that in 34 of 44 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 77%.

The 50-day Moving Average for IRMD moved above the 200-day moving average on November 23, 2020. This could be a long-term bullish signal for the stock as the stock shifts to an upward trend.

Following a +2.98% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where IRMD advanced for three days, in 225 of 289 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 78%.

IRMD may jump back above the lower band and head toward the middle band. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/9747410-iradimed-irmd-24-21-enters-uptrend-as-momentum-indicator-ascends-above-0-level-on-mar-08-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=signal)
